title: knowledge-meta idTypeMap loader for doctor cite-coverage routing
description: Add loader function loadKbIdTypeMap(projectRoot) returning Map<stable_id, knowledge_type> from the existing knowledge-meta build pipeline. Consumed by runDoctorCiteCoverage (TASK-08) for type-aware cite routing and cite_id_unresolved bucket detection.

files.target: export new helper near existing exports
files.change: Add `export async function loadKbIdTypeMap(projectRoot: string): Promise<Map<string, KnowledgeType>>`. Implementation: invoke existing knowledge-meta build (or read .fabric/agents.meta.json directly), iterate entries (team + personal layers via existing dual-root loop), produce Map<stable_id, knowledge_type>. Return empty map on read failure (graceful — doctor will report all cites as unresolved).

Test cases: (1) team layer only — returns KT-* entries with types; (2) personal layer populated — returns mixed KT-* and KP-* entries; (3) missing agents.meta.json — returns empty map; (4) malformed entry — skipped with no throw; (5) snapshot type values match canonical enum. ≥5 cases.

implementation: Read packages/server/src/services/knowledge-meta-builder.ts L337-L400 to confirm existing dual-root scan pattern (team + personal).
Decide source: option A (re-run knowledge-meta build), option B (read .fabric/agents.meta.json directly — faster). Prefer B since meta is kept in sync by engine.
Implement loadKbIdTypeMap parsing agents.meta.json nodes; for each node extract stable_id + knowledge_type frontmatter mirror.
Handle absence of meta file (graceful empty map).
Add test cases per files[].change directive.
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server test knowledge-meta-builder` to confirm green.

reference.examples: Existing knowledge-meta-builder scans team+personal roots; loadKbIdTypeMap is a thin extract on top.

rationale.chosen_approach: Read agents.meta.json directly (B) — engine keeps it in sync, no need to re-walk filesystem on every doctor invocation.
alternatives_considered: Re-run knowledge-meta build (rejected: slow, IO-heavy for what's a constant data point)
Walk knowledge/ directories directly (rejected: duplicates engine logic)
rationale.tradeoffs: Stale meta → stale type map; mitigated by engine auto-sync + fab doctor --fix recovery.

manual_checks: Manual: populate personal KB entry, verify loader returns KP-* entry with correct type
success_metrics: Empty map graceful on missing meta

criteria: Function handles missing meta file gracefully (empty map, no throw)
Function includes both team (KT-*) and personal (KP-*) entries
